description_long: This hotel is a modern mid-rise building with a rectangular footprint, featuring a mix of white, blue, and dark gray exterior panels. The structure has multiple floors, each with balconies that are enclosed by glass or light blue railings, providing outdoor space for many rooms. The roof is partially open, with visible rooftop amenities such as seating areas and possibly a pool or lounge, suggesting a focus on guest leisure. Large windows are distributed across the facade, maximizing natural light and offering views from the rooms. The building is set on a landscaped plot with green lawns and a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric lines.
description: A modern, multi-story hotel with white, blue, and dark gray panels, featuring balconies, large windows, and a landscaped setting. The rooftop includes open leisure areas, and the building has a clean, contemporary design.
description_view_0: The hotel is seen from the side, showing a mix of dark and light panels, multiple balconies, and the main entrance area facing the street.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front facade with blue balcony railings, large windows, and the main driveway leading up to the entrance.
description_view_2: The rear of the hotel is visible, showing a simpler facade with fewer balconies, several windows, and some landscaping with small trees.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the hotel is shown, with more dark paneling, balconies, and a partial view of the rooftop amenities.
